2606.05701.title: Cognitive Threat Intelligence and Explainable Federated Security Analytics for distributed Infrastructure Systems
2606.05701.paper_summary: The increasing adoption of distributed infrastructure systems, cloud computing, Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, and edge-based architectures has significantly expanded the cybersecurity attack surface and introduced increasingly sophisticated cyber threats. Conventional centralized intrusion detection approaches often face challenges related to scalability, data privacy, communication overhead, and limited transparency in artificial intelligence-driven decision-making processes. To address these limitations, this study proposes a Cognitive Threat Intelligence and Explainable Federated Security Analytics framework for distributed infrastructure systems. The proposed framework integrates Federated Learning (FL), Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), and cognitive cybersecurity analytics to enable collaborative and privacy-preserving cyber threat detection across distributed network environments. Instead of transmitting sensitive raw network traffic data to centralized servers, local security models are independently trained at distributed nodes, where only encrypted model parameters and updates are shared through a federated aggregation mechanism. This decentralized learning architecture improves privacy protection while reducing communication dependency and centralized security risks. To enhance intelligent threat analysis, the framework incorporates machine learning and deep learning algorithms including Random Forest, XGBoost, Autoencoder
2606.05701.paper_summary_zh: 隨著分散式基礎設施系統、雲計算、物聯網（IoT）技術和邊緣架構的日益普及，網絡安全攻擊面顯著擴大，並引入了越來越複雜的網絡威脅。傳統的集中式入侵檢測方法通常面臨與可擴展性、數據隱私、通信開銷以及人工智能驅動的決策過程中有限透明度相關的挑戰。為了解決這些限制，本研究提出了一個認知威脅情報和可解釋的聯邦安全分析框架，針對分散式基礎設施系統。所提出的框架整合了聯邦學習（FL）、可解釋的人工智能（XAI）和認知網絡安全分析，以實現跨分散網絡環境的協作和隱私保護的網絡威脅檢測。該框架不會將敏感的原始網絡流量數據傳輸到集中式伺服器，而是在分散節點上獨立訓練本地安全模型，僅通過聯邦聚合機制共享加密的模型參數和更新。這種去中心化的學習架構改善了隱私保護，同時降低了通信依賴性和集中式安全風險。為了增強智能威脅分析，該框架納入了包括隨機森林、XGBoost、自編碼器在內的機器學習和深度學習算法。
2606.05701.author: Md. Arifur Rahman et.al.
2606.05701.authors: Md. Arifur Rahman, B. M. Taslimul Haque, Md. Iqbal Hossan, Md. Serajul Kabir Chowdhury Rubel
